title: Namib Desert Star Dunes at Twilight
prompt: A sweeping photorealistic landscape of the Namib Desert's towering star dunes at twilight, their sinuous ridgelines casting deep violet and amber shadows as the last light fades. The sky transitions from deep indigo overhead to a warm burnt-orange horizon, with the first stars of the night emerging through the haze. A lone oryx silhouette stands atop a dune crest, adding a sense of solitary grandeur to the vast, silent desert.

title: Rooftop Twirl Low Angle
prompt: A young solo female model with blonde hair and Korean appearance, dressed in a flowing summer dress, twirls dramatically on a sunlit rooftop terrace with a panoramic city skyline in the background. Shot from a low angle, the camera looks up at her as she spins with arms outstretched, the dress fanning out, against a deep blue sky and fluffy white clouds. Golden hour sunlight bathes the scene in warm, glowing tones, creating a lifestyle-candid mood with a cinematic, airy feel. High-fashion lighting and bokeh background blur give it a Vogue-style editorial look with dreamy film grain texture.

title: Cafe Sit Hands Face Surprised High Angle
prompt: A young solo female model with blonde hair and Korean appearance sits at a small marble cafe table, both hands gently framing her face with wide surprised eyes and slightly parted lips, wearing a chic oversized blazer. Shot from a dramatic high angle looking straight down, capturing the circular cafe table with a coffee cup, scattered rose petals, and the model's full seated figure below. Soft diffused afternoon light floods through tall cafe windows, creating warm golden reflections on the marble surface. Vogue-style editorial with sharp fashion details, elegant depth, and a cinematic high-fashion atmosphere.
